name: pi-extension-workflows
description: Workflow engine for autonomous repo workflows

scripts.typecheck: nix run nixpkgs#typescript -- --noEmit --pretty false --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2022 --lib es2022,dom api.ts db.ts dynamic.ts engine.ts grinder.ts index.ts loader.ts registry.ts tests/*.test.ts scripts/smoke.ts
